<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/eth_syncing"}
  context={"endpoint"}

</MethodEndpoint>



**`eth_syncing`** - Returns an object with data about the sync status or false.

Send a **JSON-RPC 2.0** request (`jsonrpc`, `method`, `params`, `id`) as in the example below.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","method","params","id"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"method":{"type":"string","enum":["eth_syncing"]},"params":{"type":"array","description":"Ordered JSON array of positional parameters for this method.","minItems":0,"maxItems":0,"items":{}},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}],"example":1}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_syncing","params":[],"id":1}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful JSON-RPC 2.0 response over HTTP. The return value is in `result`. On failure, nodes typically still respond with HTTP 200 and an `error` object instead of `result`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","id","result"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}]},"result":{"title":"isSyncingResult","oneOf":[{"title":"syncingData","description":"An object with sync status data","type":"object","properties":{"startingBlock":{"title":"integer hex","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$","description":"Hex representation of the integer"},"currentBlock":{"title":"integer hex","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$","description":"Hex representation of the integer"},"highestBlock":{"title":"integer hex","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$","description":"Hex representation of the integer"},"knownStates":{"title":"integer hex","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$","description":"Hex representation of the integer"},"pulledStates":{"title":"integer hex","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$","description":"Hex representation of the integer"}}},{"title":"notSyncing","type":"boolean"}]}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"startingBlock":"0x384","currentBlock":"0x386","highestBlock":"0x454"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
